name: @gitgecko/plug-embed
description: Embeddings plug for the code-intel owner. Salvaged from continue's LanceDbIndex (P-codeintel-10): batch chunk embedding via a pluggable EmbeddingProvider (BYO model — G5), dual store (LanceDB+SQLite prod, in-memory tests), cosine nearest-neighbor retrieval. Fourth step of Greptile's pipeline — the embeddings pillar.
